title: Stock Market Timing Mistakes That Investors Can't Afford to Make | Dimensional
author: Featuring Mark Gochnour, Head of Global Client Services Group
text:
Perspectives Stock Market Timing Mistakes That Investors Can't Afford to Make Featuring Mark Gochnour, Head of Global Client Services Group   |   Jake DeKinder, Head of Client Communications   |   Kaitlin Hendrix, CFA, Asset Allocation Research Director and Vice President Stock Market Timing Mistakes That Investors Can't Afford to Make View All Insights

Jun 12, 2026 Topic Equity Investing Investment Principles

In Episode 49 of The Informed Investor podcast: Why is market timing so alluring for so many investors? KEY TAKEAWAYS What matters is time in the market, not timing the market. Stick with a diversified, low-cost portfolio. Avoid emotional decision-making with your investments.  VIEW ALL EPISODES ON YOUTUBE
Also available on Spotify and Apple Podcasts.
